name: Pro Rata Benefit Increase Tax Reduction

eligibility.description: Requires a plan amendment to provide pro rata increases in accrued benefits to all qualified participants, taking effect immediately on the termination date.

actionability.retroactive_note: Action required during tax year — verify if still applicable

description: Reduces the excise tax on plan asset reversions from 50% to 20% by providing pro rata benefit increases to participants with an aggregate present value of at least 20% of the reversion amount.
